content: Tailwind v3's default preset (stubs/config.full.js) defines borderColor and ringColor as functions of theme('colors'): borderColor spreads ...theme('colors') with DEFAULT=gray-200; ringColor spreads ...theme('colors') with DEFAULT=blue-500. Because both are theme('colors')-derived, extending theme.extend.colors with new keys (e.g. 'default', 'brand') automatically produces matching border-*/ring-*/text-*/bg-* utilities with no separate borderColor/ringColor config block needed.
